Transfer Points / Stars

Record Daily Score

Star Transfer

Transfer stars between students using the selected Date and Month above.

Star -> VETO Conversion

Convert stars of selected student at fixed ratio: 5 stars = 1 VETO.

Points -> Star Conversion

Convert points to stars for selected student. Rule: 150 points = 1 star. Student must have minimum points.

Tip: Saving a score for the same student and date will update the existing entry.

All students shown by default. Use filters above to optimise the list.

Board-wise Syllabus & Coverage Tracker

Boards: CBSE, ICSE, WBBSE. Classes: 3-12. Subject chapters/topics are pre-seeded and can be expanded. Teachers/Admin can mark repeated conducted dates; attendance list is fetched from attendance records.

Bulk Past Attendance (Rapid)

Separate module for fast previous-month marking. Select dates to mark and apply in one click.

Logic: selected dates are set to chosen status; all remaining dates of that month are set to selected remaining status.

Loading...

Good Conduct Badge — Eligibility

Students eligible for the Good Conduct Badge based on attendance and score performance across all months.

Formula: Attendance Rate ≥ 75% across all months  |  Average Monthly Score ≥ 0 (net positive)  |  No month with score below −100  |  VETO usage ≤ 1 total  |  Must be Active student
# Roll Student Name Group Attendance % Avg Score Months VETOs Used Lowest Month Badge Status

Excel Uploads

Use separate uploads for historical data and the latest active roster.

LAN Sync & Backups

Your work is saved locally and LAN sync runs in near real-time. Use Master Update for forced convergence across devices.

Supabase Health
Health check pending...

If server is down, installed app keeps working locally and auto-syncs queued changes when any configured server comes back online.

Database Management

Manage your offline database

Restore From Backup (Admin)

Preview and restore a server backup. Current live data is auto-backed up before restore. 


            


            
            

                
 Connected Devices Log

                

                    Every login from any device is recorded here with device name, OS, browser, IP and a persistent
                    Device UUID (browser-local ID).
                    Note: Browser security prevents reading MAC addresses; the UUID uniquely identifies each browser instance instead.
